verses.text: Tua ciangin Samuel in sathau thawl khat la a, ama lu tungah buakin amah nam a, “ Topa in ama mi Israel-te tungah ulian dingin nang sathau hong nilh khin hilo ahi hiam? Nangmah in Topa' mite ukin a kiima om amau' galte' khutsung panin amaute na honkhia ding hi. Topa in ama luahte tungah ulian dingin nang sathau hong nilh khitna lim hih bang hi ding hi

Tuni-in kei kiang panin na paikhiat ciangin Benjamin-te' gam Rachel' han kiang Zelzah-ah mihing nih na tuak ding a, amaute in nang kiangah, ‘Pai-a na zon' late kimu khin a, tu-in na pa in late ngaihsun nawnloin nangmah hong lunghimawh a, “Ka tapa bang cih ding ka hi hiam?” ci hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi

Tua ciangin tua lai panin pai lai-in Tabor tawsaw lak na tung ding hi. Tua lai panin Bethel-a Pasian kiangah a paito, keelno thum a pua mi khat, anlum thum a pua adang khat, leh leenggahzu savun thawl khat a pua mi khat, mi thum in nang hong dawn ding uh hi
Amaute in nang hong hopihin nangmah in amau' tung panin na san' ding anlum nih nang tungah hong pia ding uh hi

Tua khit ciangin Filistia khuacingte a omna Gibeath-elohim na tung ding hi. Tua khuapi sung na tun' ciangin amaute mai-ah, harp lasakna, khuangneu, tamngai, leh laia lasakna tawh laamin awng kawmin mualtunga biakna panin hong paisuk kamsang honkhat na tuak ding hi
Tua ciangin Topa' kha in khauhtakin nang hong uk ding a, amaute tawh laamin awng khawmin mi tuamdang khatin na kikhel ding hi
Hih limte nang tungah hong tun' ciangin na tuah peuhpeuh na hih ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nang tawh Pasian hong om hi

Tua ciangin keima mai Gilgal-ah na paisuk ding hi. Meihal biaknate leh thunuama biaknate a pia dingin nang kiangah kei zong kong pai ding hi. Nang kiangah kei hong pai-in na hih ding teng kong lah mateng, ni sagih sung na ngak ding hi,” a ci hi
Samuel nusia dingin a nunghei ciangin Pasian in ama tungah pianzia thak khat a pia hi. Tua ni-in Samuel' gen limte khempeuh a piang hi
Gibeah-ah amaute a tun' uh ciangin, kamsang honkhat in amah na dawn hi. Pasian' kha in khauhtakin amah hong man takpi a, amah zong amaute' lakah laamin a awng hi
Tua ciangin kamsangte tawh a gamtat khawmna, amah a theisa mi khempeuhte in a muh uh ciangin khatlekhat in, “Kish' tapa' tungah bang tung ahi hiam? Saul zong kamsang suak ahi hiam?” kici uh hi
Tua ciangin tua lai-a mite khat in dongin, “Hih kamsang dangte kua' tate ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin, “Saul nangawn kamsang suak hi,” cihna paunak a kipatna hong suak hi
Tua bangin laamin a otna a man ciangin mualtunga biakna tau omna-ah a pai hi

Saul' pano in amah leh a nasempa a muh ciangin, “Koi-ah pai na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Late a zong dingin ka pai uh hi. Late kimu zolo ding ci-in ka theih uh ciangin Samuel kiangah ka pai uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Saul' pano in, “Kong thum hi; Samuel in nang kiangah hong gen teng kei tungah hong gen in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Saul in a pano kiangah, “Late a kimuh khitna ko kiangah teltakin hong kigen hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin Samuel in a gen kumpi suahna ding thu tawh kisai ama tungah bangmah genlo hi
Tu-in Samuel in Mizpah-a Topa' kiangah mite khawm hi

Amah in Israel mite kiangah, “Israel-te' Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Egypt panin Israel-te ka paikhiatpih a, Egypt-te' khutsung leh note hong nengniam kumpi gamte khempeuh' khutsung panin note kong honkhia hi,’ ci hi

Ahih hangin note in na tuahsiatnate uh leh na lungkhamnate uh panin note a hong honkhia na Pasian uh tuni-in na nial uh a, note in, ‘Kote' tungah kumpi khat koih in,’ na ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na minam nam uh leh a tul tulin Topa' mai-ah kilak un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Samuel in Israel minamte khempeuh a nai-ah hong paipih a, aisanna tawh Benjamin minam kila hi

Amah in Benjamin minamte a behbehin hong paipih a, aisanna tawh Matri innkuan kila hi. A tawpna-ah amah in Matri innkuan a mi malin hong paipih a, aisanna tawh Kish' tapa Saul kila hi. Ahih hangin amaute in amah a zon' uh ciangin amah kimu zolo hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Topa kiangah dongkik uh a, “Tua mipa hih lai-ah hong pai hiam?” ci uh a, Topa in, “En un, amahmah van kawm lakah bu hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute tai-in tua lai mun panin amah hong paipih uh hi. Mite' lakah amah a din' ciangin mi khempeuh ama liangko ciang bek pha uh hi

Tua ciangin Samuel in mi khempeuh tungah, “ Topa in a teelsa mipa na mu uh hiam? Mi khempeuh lakah amah tawh a kibang khat zong omlo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh awngin, “Kumpipa khan'sau hen!” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin Samuel in kumpipa' thuneihna leh a nasepte mite kiangah gen a, amah in tuate laibu khat sungah gelhin Topa' mai-ah a koih hi. Tua ciangin Samuel in mi khempeuh amau' inn ciatah a ciahsak hi
Saul zong Gibeah-a ama inn-ah ciah a, Pasian in amau' lungsim a lawn'sak mi thahatte zong amah tawh a pai uh hi

Ahih hangin bangmah a manlo mi pawlkhat in, “Hih mipa in eite hong bangci hotkhiat zawh ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in amah simmawhin ama kiangah letsong puaklo uh hi. Ahih hangin amah in tua mite bangmah cihlo hi.
